name: W7M Evergreen Telegraph Gangster Crips
description: The W7M Evergreen Telegraph Gangster Crips (W7M ETGC), commonly referred to as W7M ScoreGang (SCRG), are a predominantly African American, Detroit-based Crip-affiliated street gang operating on Detroit's far northwest side. They are a prominent faction within the 5Point Nation alliance and reflect a fusion of local Detroit gang structures with Gangster Crip (3X/Movin Gang) self-identification. Their early roots trace to the tagger crew Bloc Side Soldiers (B.S.S.), with the group adopting 5Point Nation symbolism beginning around 2015.
